timeline_events.headline: #DogsOfWar: Miguna has seen this before. These aren’t revolutionaries, they’re operatives, rehearsing their next circus. First
timeline_events.summary: Miguna has seen this before. These aren’t revolutionaries, they’re operatives, rehearsing their next circus. First Kenya, now Tanzania.  KenyavsTZ Gachagua Arrested. Observed across 2 posts from 1 accounts on X (Twitter). Campaign hashtags: #DogsOfWar.
